text: [ ST ETTIETTT R W EN E TN JGT By (1o Ty Tl Co e\ T o TETVW B « Ethernet Protocol will be called for framing if the Network device uses UTP copper RJ45 cables. « PPP or HDLC Protocol will be called for framing when serial leased line cabling through Telco PSTN is used. « Frame Relay Protocol will be called for framing when the connection uses Frame Relay switching for WAN or internet connection.
